title: SR 15-5 / CA 15-2: Supervisory Letter SR 15-5 / CA 15-2 on Guidance to Encourage Financial Institutions' Youth Savings Programs and Address Related Frequently Asked Questions -- February 24, 2015
title_normalized: Supervisory Letter SR 15-5 / CA 15-2 on Guidance to Encourage Financial Institutions' Youth Savings Programs and Address Related Frequently Asked Questions -- February 24, 2015

issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
applicability_raw: to Community Banking Organizations:  This guidance applies to insured depository institutions supervised by the Federal Reserve, including those with $10 billion or less in total consolidated assets.
